email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Social Media Specialist bij Samsonite. Uw oproep voor een operationele rol in contentcreatie en social media management sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring als junior digital marketer.

Bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, schrijf ik keyword-gerichte content en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Op mijn eigen project mirook.com pas ik gestructureerde data en GEO toe om zichtbaarheid te verbeteren. Hoewel mijn focus nu op SEO ligt, heb ik ervaring met sociale media-integratie en contentcreatie met tools zoals Canva. Ik ben leergierig en snel in het oppakken van nieuwe platforms, zoals Meta Ads Manager of Smartly.

U zoekt iemand met een ondernemende en analytische mindset, die vloeiend Engels spreekt en graag samenwerkt. Ik werk in het Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (ik volg lessen). Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Antwerpen, en ben flexibel.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn digitale vaardigheden in te zetten voor het versterken van uw sociale mediakanalen. Ik voeg mijn CV en motivatiebrief bij.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Social Media Specialist position at Samsonite. Your call for an operational role in content creation and social media management aligns perfectly with my experience as a junior digital marketer.

At Episto, I handle on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted content, and manage WordPress sites. On my own project mirook.com, I apply structured data and GEO to improve visibility. Although my current focus is SEO, I have experience with social media integration and content creation using tools like Canva. I am eager to learn and quick to pick up new platforms, such as Meta Ads Manager or Smartly.

You are looking for someone with an entrepreneurial and analytical mindset, fluent in English, and a team player. I work in English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (I am taking lessons). I live in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and am flexible.

I look forward to applying my digital skills to strengthen your social media channels. I attach my CV and cover letter.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste hr-team,

Toen ik de vacature voor Social Media Specialist bij Samsonite zag, voelde ik meteen een klik. Uw merk staat voor kwaliteit en innovatie in reisaccessoires, en ik wil graag bijdragen aan het versterken van uw digitale aanwezigheid in Europa.

Als junior digital marketer met een technische achtergrond in webdesign en SEO, breng ik een unieke combinatie van vaardigheden mee. Bij Episto optimaliseer ik websites voor zoekmachines, schrijf ik content en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Op mirook.com pas ik GEO en gestructureerde data toe om zichtbaarheid in AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren. Hoewel mijn focus nu op SEO ligt, heb ik ervaring met sociale media-integratie en contentcreatie met Canva. Ik ben gemotiveerd om mijn kennis uit te breiden naar social advertising, community management en influencer marketing.

U zoekt iemand die vlot schrijft, campagnes beheert en trends bijhoudt. Ik schrijf in het Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (ik volg lessen). Ik ben analytisch, werk gestructureerd en leer snel nieuwe tools zoals Smartly of Adobe Creative Suite. Mijn ervaring met Google Analytics en SEMrush helpt mij om prestaties te meten en te optimaliseren.

Wat mij aanspreekt in Samsonite is de focus op duurzaamheid en design, en de kans om te werken met een internationaal team. Ik wil graag mijn digitale vaardigheden inzetten om uw sociale mediakanalen te laten groeien en de community te betrekken.

Ik hoop u in een gesprek te overtuigen van mijn motivatie en potentieel. Bedankt voor uw tijd.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear HR team,

When I saw the vacancy for Social Media Specialist at Samsonite, I felt an immediate connection. Your brand stands for quality and innovation in travel accessories, and I want to contribute to strengthening your digital presence in Europe.

As a junior digital marketer with a technical background in web design and SEO, I bring a unique combination of skills. At Episto, I optimize websites for search engines, write content, and manage WordPress sites. On mirook.com, I apply GEO and structured data to improve visibility in AI search engines. Although my current focus is SEO, I have experience with social media integration and content creation using Canva. I am motivated to expand my knowledge into social advertising, community management, and influencer marketing.

You are looking for someone who writes well, manages campaigns, and keeps up with trends. I write in English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (I am taking lessons). I am analytical, structured, and quick to learn new tools like Smartly or Adobe Creative Suite. My experience with Google Analytics and SEMrush helps me measure and optimize performance.

What appeals to me about Samsonite is the focus on sustainability and design, and the opportunity to work with an international team. I want to apply my digital skills to grow your social media channels and engage the community.

I hope to convince you of my motivation and potential in an interview. Thank you for your time.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
- Content creation and social media integration experience (Canva, WordPress, social media content)
- Hands-on with SEO, analytics, and performance reporting (Google Analytics, SEMrush, Ahrefs)
- Quick learner of new digital tools and platforms (e.g., Smartly, Adobe Creative Suite)
- Entrepreneurial mindset: built and optimized own project mirook.com with structured data and GEO
- Fluent in English, B1 Dutch (actively improving), team player with strong organizational skills
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · Social Media · Content · SEO
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and content creation. Experienced in social media integration, content management, and performance reporting. At Episto, I run on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted content, and build WordPress sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data and GEO to improve visibility across search engines. Comfortable with content creation tools like Canva and eager to grow into social advertising, community management, and influencer marketing. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Social media & content: social media content & integration, content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
